zh.London, City of London, Greater London,: 英國英格蘭倫敦布倫登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Wight於1400年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦布倫登時，她的父親Charly Mury Mercy30歲，母親Juliet Blanch31歲。她於大約1420年與Richard Barry結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1460年在她的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.London, City of London, Greater London,: 英国英格兰倫敦布倫登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Wight于1400年出生在英国英格兰倫敦布倫登时，她的父亲Charly Mury Mercy30岁，母亲Juliet Blanch31岁。她于大约1420年与Richard Barry结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1460年在她的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wight
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: nickname from Middle English wiht, wight ‘agile, nimble, strong, brave’ (Old Norse víg with the Old Norse neuter suffix -t, for which compare the word scant), or from the corresponding Older Scots word wicht. Possibly sometimes a nickname from Middle English wight ‘living creature; small portion or thing’, or from the corresponding Older Scots word wicht.

English: habitational name from the Isle of Wight. The island is recorded as Vectis (its Latin name) c. 150 AD . Its name derives from a British word, perhaps related to Welsh gwaith ‘turn, course’, meaning ‘place of the division’, in reference to the island's position in the Solent.
English and Scottish: variant of   White  .

variants.name: White
meanings: English: from Middle English white, wit (Old English hwīt ‘white’), hence a nickname for someone with white hair or a pale complexion. In some cases it is perhaps from a Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Hwīta, a short form of names in Hwīt- (from hwīt ‘white’). The name may also be topographic, referring to someone who lived by a bend or curve in a river or road (from Old English wiht ‘bend’), the source of the placename of Great Whyte in Ramsey, Huntingdonshire (compare Wight ). This name is also a variant of Wight . The surname White is also very common among African Americans.

Irish and Scottish: adopted for any of several Irish and Scottish Gaelic names based on bán ‘white, fair’ (see Bain 1, McElwain ) or fionn ‘fair’ (see Finn 1). The English surname has been Gaelicized in Ireland as de Faoite.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘white’, for example German Weiss , French Blanc , Polish Białas (see Bialas ), Slovenian Belec , or any other synonymous Slavic surname beginning with Bel-, Bev-, Biel- or Bil-.

variants.name: Weight
meanings: English: variant of   Wight   or   Waite  .

variants.name: Wightman
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname from Middle English wight, Older Scots wicht ‘brave, strong; swift, nimble, agile’ (see Wight ) + man ‘man’, also used in Middle English as a personal name. It may sometimes have been confused with Whiteman , a variant of Whitman .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Wight was born in 1400, in Blendon, London, England, United Kingdom, her father, Charly Mury Mercy, was 30 and her mother, Juliet Blanch, was 31. She married Richard Barry about 1420. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1460, in her hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Wight est née en 1400, à Blendon, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Charly Mury Mercy, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Juliet Blanch, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Barry environ 1420. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1460, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Wight 1400 in Blendon, London, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Charly Mury Mercy 30 und ihre Mutter Juliet Blanch 31. Sie hat um 1420 Richard Barry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1460 im Alter von 60 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Wight è nata il nel 1400 nel Blendon, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Charly Mury Mercy, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Juliet Blanch, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Richard Barry circa 1420. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1460, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.London, City of London, Greater London,: イギリスイギリスロンドンブレンドン
ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Wightが1400年にイギリスイギリスロンドンブレンドンで生まれた時，父Charly Mury Mercyは30歳，母Juliet Blanchは31歳であった。約1420年にRichard Barryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1460年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Wight(이)가 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 블렌던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Charly Mury Mercy(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Juliet Blanch(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1420년 Richard Barry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 그녀의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.London, City of London, Greater London,: Blendon, Lundenwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Wight nasceu em 1400, em Blendon, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Charly Mury Mercy, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Juliet Blanch, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Barry aproximadamente 1420. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1460, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Wight родилась в 1400 г. в местности блендон, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Charly Mury Mercy было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliet Blanch, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Barry около 1420 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1460 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Wight nació en 1400, en Blendon, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Charly Mury Mercy, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Juliet Blanch, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Richard Barry aproximadamente 1420. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1460, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
